data.title: $105M in Ether shorts 'smoked' as Ether surpasses $4,000; Eric Trump advises against betting on Bitcoin and Ether bears.
data.description: Eric Trump cautioned against underestimating Bitcoin and Ether as the price of Ether surpassed $4,000, hitting this milestone for the first time in eight months.

data.title: Eric Trump happy after $105 million Ether shorts loss. Ether hits $4,000, he'll avoid betting against Bitcoin and Ether.
data.description: Eric Trump has cautioned against doubting Bitcoin and Ether, especially as Ether hit a milestone by crossing $4,000 for the first time in eight months.

data.title: American Foundation of Savoy Orders to host 19th annual Lecture Series on Oct 9, 2025 in NYC with guest speaker.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, the 19th annual Lecture Series hosted by the American Foundation of Savoy Orders, Inc. will take place at a private club in New York City. The event will focus on the topic "Pope Pius IX and The Kingdom of Italy" and will feature Professor Caroline Weber as the guest speaker.

data.title: Elegoo launches $1M Creator Fund to support and reward creators of original 3D model designs.
data.description: A new initiative has been introduced in SHENZHEN, China on August 8, 2025, marking the launch of a unique fund to support creators. Elegoo, a prominent global smart manufacturing brand, has rolled out a groundbreaking $1 million creator fund. This initiative aims to assist creators in earning from their original 3D model designs. The fund, the first of its kind with seven-digit funding, is designed to incentivize and reward exceptional creativity in the industry.

data.title: VIQ Solutions Inc. (TSX: VQS) amends credit agreement with Beedie Investments Ltd. to amend terms of agreement.
data.description: VIQ Solutions Inc., a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: VQS) and specializing in secure digital voice and video capture technology and transcription services, has recently signed an eighth amendment agreement with Beedie Investments Ltd. The amendment will modify specific terms of the credit agreement that was originally established on January 13, 2023, between VIQ and the Lender. This development marks a significant step for VIQ Solutions as it continues to navigate its financial operations.

data.title: ThinkCareBelieve praises President Trump's achievements in first 200 days, citing data showing all income groups benefitted. Peace agreement between Armenia and Azerbaijan reached. Leaders nominate Trump for Nobel Peace Prize. Russia~Ukraine war avoided escalation.
data.description: ThinkCareBelieve's article highlights the accomplishments of President Trump and his team during the first 200 days in office, focusing on the positive impact on all income groups in America. The new census bureau data, presented by Stephen Moore, reveals improvements in lower, middle, and upper income families. Notably, the highest income bracket benefited the least but still saw positive changes. In a significant development, a Trilateral Peace Agreement between Armenia and Azerbaijan was brokered, marking the end of a 30-year conflict. Both leaders praised President Trump for his role in achieving peace and plan to nominate him for the Nobel Peace Prize. President Trump emphasized his administration's efforts in saving lives and preventing potential conflicts, hinting at a future meeting involving Russia and Ukraine. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Savoy Foundation to host 19th Annual Lecture Series in NYC on Oct 9, 2025, focusing on Pope Pius IX and The Kingdom of Italy.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, PRNewswire reported that the Savoy Foundation will be organizing its 19th annual Lecture Series on October 9, 2025 at a private club in New York City. The lecture will focus on the topic "Pope Pius IX and The Kingdom of Italy." The event will feature a guest speaker and is expected to attract a large audience interested in the historical connection between Pope Pius IX and Italy.

data.title: Dark Horse CPAs hires Joey Kinney as Principal Accelerator in Albuquerque, NM, to expand SMB CFO & accounting practice. #CPA #Accounting #Expansion
data.description: In Cardiff By The Sea, California on August 8, 2025, Dark Horse CPAs, a leading national accounting and tax company catering to small businesses and individuals, reveals the appointment of Joseph Kinney, CPA, also known as Joey Kinney, as a Principal Accelerator in its groundbreaking Principal Accelerator Program.

data.title: Columbia University faces investigation for data breach of 868,969 records containing sensitive personal info.
data.description: Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP is currently conducting an investigation into a significant data breach that has affected approximately 868,969 individuals, which includes applicants, students, and employees of Columbia University in New York. This breach has exposed sensitive personal information. Your attention is required to a Data Breach Alert concerning Columbia University.

data.title: Anbio Biotech launches Chikungunya rapid test & 15-min PCR system for outbreak detection globally.
data.description: Anbio is dedicated to enhancing point-of-care diagnostics for the early detection of outbreaks globally, focusing on mosquito-borne diseases as well as emerging respiratory pathogens. Their efforts aim to rapidly identify and address health threats on a worldwide scale.

data.title: President Trump nominates Stephen Miran to temporarily join the Fed Board of Governors, filling vacancy left by Adriana Kugler.
data.description: If the nomination is approved, Stephen Miran, the current head of the Council of Economic Advisers, will temporarily assume the role left by Adriana Kugler, who is departing ahead of schedule.

data.title: Temporary Fed pick Stephen I. Miran could impact interest rate talks during his brief tenure, shaping next leader decisions.
data.description: Stephen I. Miran, a member of the central bank's board of governors, may have a short tenure of just a few months, yet during this time, he holds sway over important discussions relating to interest rates and the selection of the institution's future leader.

data.title: Stephen Miran, a Trump ally, may join Fed, advocating for weak dollar and lower rates. Markets could be impacted.
data.description: Stephen Miran, a high-ranking consultant to the president, is anticipated to assume a position as governor at the central bank. He has been advocating for a devalued dollar and reduced interest rates as part of his economic strategy.

data.title: Intel’s CEO stands firm amid calls for resignation by Trump over alleged Chinese investments, pledges loyalty to company.
data.description: After being urged by President Trump to resign due to alleged Chinese investments, Intel's CEO, Lip-Bu Tan, reaffirmed his dedication to the company.

data.title: Is Russia economically strong enough to withstand Trump's sanctions? Kremlin can continue Ukraine fight despite slowing economy. #Russia #Trump #sanctions
data.description: Even prior to President Trump's recent warnings, the Russian economy was already showing signs of weakening. Despite this, the Kremlin possesses sufficient financial resources to continue its conflict in Ukraine.

data.title: Taiwan faces 20% tariffs, no trade deal, and political instability, affecting export manufacturers.
data.description: Manufacturers in Taiwan are experiencing higher tariffs from the U.S. compared to neighboring countries, resulting in increased financial pressure. Additionally, they are grappling with a strengthening currency, exacerbating their challenges.

data.title: Japan voices displeasure over tariff error by Trump; US-Japan tensions rise with conflicting trade deal views.
data.description: Recent tensions have been escalating between the United States and Japan over a trade deal that was sealed last month, with both countries holding contrasting views on the agreement.

data.title: Executive order by Trump expands investment options for 401(k) to include crypto, private equity, real estate. Employers proceeding cautiously.
data.description: The executive order is designed to provide investors with increased investment choices. However, experts predict that employers will proceed cautiously before incorporating alternative assets into their portfolios.

data.title: Disney settles lawsuit filed by Gina Carano over firing from "The Mandalorian" for expressing controversial views.
data.description: Following her removal from "The Mandalorian," Gina Carano filed a lawsuit against Disney. The decision was taken after she posted conspiracy theories and expressed right-wing views on social media platforms. This legal action is significant as Carano had been a prominent part of the show and her sudden departure garnered attention. Disney's move to dismiss her resulted in controversy, with her supporters defending her actions. The lawsuit highlights the ongoing debate around freedom of expression and the consequences for public figures. The case is unfolding against the backdrop of growing scrutiny of public statements made by individuals in the entertainment industry. It reflects a broader discussion regarding the responsibilities and repercussions faced by individuals who hold influential positions. The legal battle between Carano and Disney has drawn considerable interest, with people closely following the developments. The outcome of this lawsuit could have implications for similar situations in the future.

data.title: India purchased Russian oil, creating tension in trade with the US. Can Modi reduce reliance on discounted Russian oil?
data.description: If Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi were to align with American President Donald Trump, would it be challenging to reduce the country's reliance on Russia's discounted trade, which currently stands at approximately 60% of total imports?
